title: BBAI / BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (NYSE) - Forecast, Price Target, Estimates, Predictions
text: BBAI stock forecast, price targets, and earnings estimates. Fintel provides aggregated analyst data showing consensus buy rating with average price target of $5.50.
